Name: Independent Payment Approval Review
Description: Finance manager reviews all payment releases performed by conflicted users on a scheduled basis.
Control Objective: Reduce the risk of unauthorized or fraudulent payment execution.

Name: New Vendor Verification
Description: A separate team validates all supplier master changes against external supporting evidence before use.
Control Objective: Reduce supplier setup fraud and unauthorized vendor creation.

Name: Three-Way Match Enforcement
Description: System-enforced three-way match must be completed before invoice payment can proceed.
Control Objective: Prevent invoice/payment conflicts from resulting in improper disbursement.

Name: Invoice Exception Review Board
Description: Invoice exceptions processed by conflicted users are escalated to an AP review board.
Control Objective: Detect and challenge override behavior in invoice handling.

Name: Credit Memo and Discount Oversight
Description: Sales and credit overrides above a threshold require second-level approval and periodic review.
Control Objective: Reduce revenue manipulation and unauthorized customer concessions.

Name: Dual Authorization for High-Risk Admin Actions
Description: Privileged access activation and toxic entitlement grants require approval from two authorized approvers.
Control Objective: Prevent unilateral activation of high-risk access.

Name: Privileged Access Session Logging
Description: Privileged admin sessions are recorded and reviewed for sensitive command execution.
Control Objective: Provide traceability and deterrence for privileged misuse.

Name: Weekly Privileged Group Membership Review
Description: Security operations reviews changes to privileged directory and platform groups each week.
Control Objective: Detect privilege creep and unauthorized admin membership.

Name: Time-Bound Exception with Auto-Expiry
Description: Approved mitigation expires automatically unless re-approved before the expiry date.
Control Objective: Ensure SoD exceptions remain temporary and governed.

Name: Emergency Access Workflow
Description: Elevated access is granted only through break-glass workflow with ticket, reason, and post-use review.
Control Objective: Control temporary elevated access for urgent operational needs.

Name: Access Assignment vs Approval Separation Review
Description: Monthly review validates that access assigners are not also final approvers for the same requests.
Control Objective: Preserve independent approval in access governance workflows.

Name: HR Transaction Dual Review
Description: Sensitive hire, transfer, and termination changes are reviewed by a second HR authority.
Control Objective: Reduce unauthorized HR lifecycle manipulation.

Name: Payroll Output Reconciliation
Description: Payroll outputs are reconciled to approved HR changes by an independent payroll reviewer.
Control Objective: Detect payroll-impacting errors or fraud.

Name: HCM Data Load Approval Gate
Description: Bulk HCM loads and integration jobs require pre-approval and post-load validation.
Control Objective: Control high-risk data movement and platform administration.

Name: Sensitive Role Assignment Ticket Validation
Description: Each sensitive entitlement assignment must reference an approved ticket or change record.
Control Objective: Ensure toxic access changes have a valid business request trail.

Name: SIEM Correlation for Toxic Activity
Description: Audit activity across systems is correlated to flag suspicious multi-step toxic activity.
Control Objective: Detect cross-system abuse patterns earlier.

Name: Independent Quarterly Access Certification
Description: Business and application owners certify mitigated toxic access quarterly.
Control Objective: Revalidate business need and remove stale mitigations.

Name: Contractor Elevated Access Restriction
Description: Contractors cannot hold selected privileged entitlements without formal VP waiver.
Control Objective: Reduce risk from third-party elevated access.

Name: Manager Attestation with Evidence Attachment
Description: Managers must attest the business need for mitigation and attach supporting evidence.
Control Objective: Strengthen auditability of SoD exception decisions.

Name: Continuous Control Failure Escalation
Description: Missed reviews, expired evidence, or failed tests automatically escalate to risk and compliance.
Control Objective: Ensure mitigations do not silently lapse or fail.
